name: ysbzs-original-ui-connected-core
description: 元素背包史：原项目UI外壳 + 新架构核心 + 单一uiAdapter/API接入。

scripts.check:all: npm test && npm run check:csv && npm run check:day7 && npm run check:dom
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='src/**/*.cjs' --test-coverage-lines=95 --test-coverage-functions=95 --test-coverage-branches=70 tests/full_coverage.test.cjs tests/ui_adapter.test.cjs tests/leader_boss_rules.test.cjs tests/planning_ai_rules.test.cjs tests/csv_source.test.cjs tests/full_player_operations.test.cjs
scripts.check:v1: npm test && npm run check:csv && npm run check:day7 && npm run check:dom
scripts.test:coverage:legacy: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='src/**/*.cjs' --test-coverage-lines=95 --test-coverage-functions=95 --test-coverage-branches=70 tests/full_coverage.test.cjs tests/ui_adapter.test.cjs tests/leader_boss_rules.test.cjs tests/planning_ai_rules.test.cjs tests/csv_source.test.cjs tests/full_player_operations.test.cjs
